title: They’ve Been Accused of Running a ‘Covert’ Operation in Greenland. It’s No Secret.
summary_full: Members of President Trump’s circle, working in plain sight, have caught the eye of Denmark’s intelligence services for trying to make friends and cut deals on the Danish territory.
summary_public: Members of President Trump’s circle, working in plain sight, have caught the eye of Denmark’s intelligence services for trying to make friends and cut deals on the Danish territory.

DK.label: negative
DK.evidence: caught the eye of Denmark’s intelligence services
